_description: Per-relation integrity in the RAN1 instantiation. 'pct' = (instances with relation / instances of source class) * 100. Snapshot 2026-05-01.
_caveat: 100% on presentedAt/madeAt reflects loader policy (every Tdoc carries a meeting placement, every Resolution is tied to a meeting). Lower coverage on references/modifiesSection is not a schema gap but a 3GPP convention: authors often cite source documents at Spec granularity (modifies) rather than clause granularity (modifiesSection), and Resolutions often reference TDoc context implicitly without a directed references edge.

presentedAt.interpretation: Every Tdoc carries a meeting placement (loader-enforced).

madeAt.interpretation: Every Resolution is tied to a meeting (loader-enforced).

submittedBy.interpretation: Most exercised CQ relation; the 0.64% gap traces to missing source metadata in the original 3GPP TDoc list.

references.interpretation: About half of Resolutions explicitly reference a TDoc; the remainder cite TDoc context implicitly within chairman-note text rather than via a directed references edge. Not a schema gap.

modifiesSection.interpretation: About one-third of CRs declare a section-level target; the remainder cite modifies (Spec-level) only, reflecting 3GPP CR cover-sheet convention. Not a schema gap.
